ddls:
CREATE TABLE "ftd_records" (
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each FTD record */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date when the FTD occurred */,
  "ftd_count" INTEGER /* Number of failures to deliver */,
  "price" TEXT /* Price of the financial instrument at the time of FTD */,
  "amount" TEXT /* Financial impact of FTD (FTD count multiplied by price) */,
  "t_plus_35_date" TEXT /* Date 35 days after the FTD occurrence */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the financial instrument */,
  "market_impact" TEXT /* Market impact of the FTD (e.g., price movement) */,
  "ftd_type" TEXT /* Type of FTD (e.g., buy, sell, short sale) */,
  "failure_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the FTD (e.g., liquidity issue, market manipulation) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ftd_records_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES financial_instruments ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market data record */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the market data */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the financial instrument */,
  "open_price" TEXT /* Opening price of the instrument */,
  "close_price" TEXT /* Closing price of the instrument */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Trading volume of the instrument */,
  "market_cap" TEXT /* Market capitalization of the instrument */,
  "high_price" TEXT /* Highest price of the instrument during the day */,
  "low_price" TEXT /* Lowest price of the instrument during the day */,
  "trading_halt" INTEGER /* Indicator for trading halt */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_data_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES financial_instruments ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "financial_instruments" (
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial instrument */,
  "instrument_name" TEXT /* Name of the financial instrument */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector to which the instrument belongs */,
  "ticker" TEXT /* Stock ticker symbol of the instrument */,
  "isin" TEXT /* International Securities Identification Number (ISIN) */,
  "issuer" TEXT /* Name of the issuer */,
  "issue_date" TEXT /* Date of issue */,
  "maturity_date" TEXT /* Maturity date (for debt instruments) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regulatory_requirements" (
  "requirement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each regulatory requirement */,
  "regulatory_body" TEXT /* Name of the regulatory body */,
  "requirement_type" TEXT /* Type of requirement (e.g., reporting, notification) */,
  "threshold" TEXT /* Threshold value for triggering the requirement */,
  "notification_period" INTEGER /* Time period for notification (in days) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("requirement_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ftd_reporting" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each FTD report */,
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the ftd_records table */,
  "requirement_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the regulatory_requirements table */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date of the report */,
  "report_status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., submitted, pending, approved) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ftd_reporting_requirement_id FOREIGN KEY ("requirement_id") REFERENCES regulatory_requirements ("requirement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ftd_reporting_record_id FOREIGN KEY ("record_id") REFERENCES ftd_records ("record_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_data_feeds" (
  "feed_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market data feed */,
  "feed_name" TEXT /* Name of the feed */,
  "feed_provider" TEXT /* Name of the feed provider */,
  "update_frequency" INTEGER /* Frequency of feed updates (in minutes) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feed_id")
)
